picks.rationale: The Celtics are strong road performers, holding a 26-16 ATS record on the road this season and 16-9 ATS as road favorites. Philadelphia is significantly weakened by injuries, with Joel Embiid doubtful due to appendectomy recovery and Kelly Oubre questionable. Boston has already established a 2-1 series lead, securing a 108-100 road victory in Game 3 where Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown were key contributors. Given the 76ers' injury woes and Boston's consistent road success, the Celtics are well-positioned to cover this spread.

picks.game: Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets
picks.rationale: The Lakers are in excellent form, having won their last four games and holding a commanding 3-0 series lead, including three consecutive outright underdog victories. Despite playing without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, Los Angeles managed an overtime win in Game 3. The Rockets are missing key players Steven Adams and Fred VanVleet for the season, with Kevin Durant also questionable. The Lakers' strong 29-20 ATS record on equal rest and 31-24 ATS after a win suggest they can maintain their momentum and cover the spread.

The Toronto Raptors are without key offensive player Immanuel Quickley for the remainder of the series due to a hamstring injury, which will likely impact their scoring output. While Game 3 saw a higher score, two of the last three head-to-head matchups in this series have gone under the total. Toronto has a strong season-long trend towards the under, with a 51-34 record to the Under, ranking among the league's best. The Cavaliers also lean towards the under, with a 43-42 record this season.

picks.game: San Antonio Spurs vs Portland Trail Blazers
picks.rationale: The Spurs demonstrated impressive depth by winning Game 3 on the road, 120-108, even with Victor Wembanyama questionable due to concussion protocol. Stephon Castle and Dylan Harper stepped up significantly in his absence, combining for 60 points. The Portland Trail Blazers are severely hampered by the absence of Damian Lillard due to an Achilles injury, a major blow to their offensive capabilities. San Antonio has won three of the last five head-to-head matchups against Portland. Given the Spurs' ability to perform without their star and Portland's key injury, San Antonio is well-positioned to cover this spread.

picks.game: Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets
picks.rationale: Amen Thompson has been a consistent rebounder for the Houston Rockets, averaging 8.0 rebounds per game over their last 20 contests. With Steven Adams out for the season and Kevin Durant questionable, Thompson's role in securing rebounds becomes even more critical for Houston. In a playoff series where every possession is crucial, Thompson's ability to crash the boards will be essential against a Lakers team that has been playing without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves. Thompson is active and playing for the Rockets today.

picks.game: Colorado Avalanche vs Los Angeles Kings
picks.rationale: The Colorado Avalanche are in dominant form, leading this playoff series 3-0 and having won nine of their last ten head-to-head matchups against the Kings, including all five games this season. Despite defenseman Josh Manson being unlikely to play, the moneyline has seen sharp movement towards Colorado, shortening from -155 to -170, indicating strong market confidence in their ability to secure a sweep. The Kings have struggled offensively in the series, making the Avalanche a strong pick to win Game 4 outright.

This series has consistently featured high-scoring games, with offense being a prominent factor in every matchup so far. The Anaheim Ducks have already scored 17 goals in the first three games, and the Edmonton Oilers possess a lethal power play, contributing to both teams' strong offensive generation. Given that neither team's defensive play has been particularly inspiring, and Edmonton is in a must-win situation, expect an aggressive offensive push leading to another high-scoring contest.

A significant head-to-head trend supports the Over in this matchup: the last four times these teams combined for five or fewer goals, the subsequent game went over 5.5 goals. With Game 3 ending in a 3-1 score (4 total goals), this trend is poised to continue in Game 4. Furthermore, an analytical model projects a score of 3.54-3.38, which totals 6.92 goals, further indicating an Over outcome.

picks.game: Tampa Bay Lightning vs Montreal Canadiens
picks.rationale: The Montreal Canadiens have demonstrated strong performance in this series, winning four of their last five games against the Lightning and holding home-ice advantage in a crucial Game 4. The Lightning have also shown vulnerability against the spread, with a 1-9 ATS record in their last ten games. With key Canadiens players active and the opportunity to take a commanding 3-1 series lead, Montreal presents excellent value at near pick'em odds.

picks.game: Tampa Bay Lightning vs Montreal Canadiens
picks.rationale: Nikita Kucherov is a primary offensive threat for the Tampa Bay Lightning, leading the team with 11 shots on goal in the current series. As a high-volume shooter and critical scorer, he will be instrumental in the Lightning's effort to even the series. With the Montreal Canadiens reportedly missing key defensive players Noah Dobson and Patrik Laine, Kucherov is likely to find increased scoring opportunities. His favorable odds of +154 offer significant value for a player of his consistent scoring prowess.

The New York Yankees are in excellent form, boasting an 8-2 record in their last 10 games and riding a 7-game winning streak as of Saturday. They recently dominated the Astros with a 12-4 victory on April 24, 2026, showcasing their offensive power. While Giancarlo Stanton is day-to-day with right lower-leg tightness, the Yankees' overall team performance and the Astros' struggling 10-18 record give New York a strong advantage. The Astros are 4-6 in their last 10 games, further highlighting the Yankees' superior momentum for this matchup.

The San Diego Padres enter this game with an impressive 8-2 record in their last 10 outings, indicating strong recent form. The Arizona Diamondbacks, conversely, are 5-5 in their last 10 games and suffered a significant blow with ace Zac Gallen exiting Saturday's game due to a right shoulder contusion, requiring further evaluation. This injury severely weakens Arizona's pitching, giving the Padres a clear advantage. San Diego also secured a 6-4 victory over the Diamondbacks in their most recent encounter on April 25, 2026.

The Cincinnati Reds are currently in excellent form, holding an 8-2 record over their last 10 games. In contrast, the Detroit Tigers have a more modest 5-5 record in their last 10 games and are dealing with a recent injury to pitcher Connor Seabold, who left Saturday's game with an ankle injury. Although the Reds placed Eugenio Suárez on the 10-day injured list, their strong overall performance and the Tigers' injury concerns make Cincinnati the favored pick. The Reds' momentum at home should be a significant factor in this matchup.

The Pittsburgh Pirates have demonstrated solid recent form, winning 3 of their last 5 games with a 60% Handicap-Runs Win% and 60% Total Runs Over%. They also secured a victory against the Milwaukee Brewers on April 25, 2026, indicating current head-to-head momentum. While the Brewers have a better historical H2H record over the last three seasons, the Pirates' current performance and favorable odds make them an attractive pick. This game presents a good value opportunity given Pittsburgh's recent success.

Both the Cleveland Guardians and Toronto Blue Jays enter this game with no reported injuries, ensuring a fair contest in terms of player availability. Historically, the Guardians have a favorable 7-5 head-to-head record against the Blue Jays over the last three seasons, suggesting they can compete effectively. While Toronto has a slight edge in recent form (3W-2L vs. Cleveland's 2W-3L in their last 5 games), the +1.5 run line provides a strong cushion for the Guardians. This pick offers good value given the historical matchup and the absence of significant injury disadvantages for Cleveland.

Real Salt Lake enters this match in significantly better form, boasting a 5-1-2 record compared to LA Galaxy's 2-3-4 start to the season. The LA Galaxy are severely hampered by key injuries, with both playmaker Riqui Puig and leading scorer João Klauss confirmed out, significantly weakening their attack and midfield. Despite their historical home advantage against RSL, the Galaxy's current home form is poor, having lost their last two MLS home games. RSL has shown resilience and offensive power, with young talents stepping up and Diego Luna contributing effectively since his return. The +185 odds offer excellent value for an in-form road team facing a depleted and struggling LA Galaxy side.

The head-to-head history between Real Salt Lake and LA Galaxy consistently features high-scoring matches, with 71% of their encounters exceeding 2.5 goals and a total of 14 goals scored in their last five matchups. Both teams have demonstrated offensive capabilities this season, with RSL netting 16 goals in 8 games and LA Galaxy scoring 13 goals in 9 games. While LA Galaxy is missing key attackers, Joseph Paintsil is expected to start and has been productive since returning from injury, and Gabriel Pec recently scored, indicating their offensive threat remains. Both sides have also displayed defensive vulnerabilities, suggesting an open game with opportunities for goals from both ends. The +125 odds for Over 3.5 goals present a strong betting opportunity given the historical trends and current attacking and defensive statistics of both teams.
